title: Principal Software Engineer
description: Leading development for an enterprise Node.js WMS and Laravel nutrition platform. Architected scalable microservices using RabbitMQ and managed AWS cloud infrastructure with automated CI/CD pipelines. Driving engineering excellence through technical leadership, code reviews, and database optimization across PostgreSQL and MongoDB.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Led the design and development of Node.js and Nest.js microservices to drive app modernization. Mentored team members, conducted code reviews, and resolved performance bottlenecks across the legacy tech stack to achieve high availability and scalability.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Developed robust APIs and microservices using Fastify and Go, including a payment gateway and localization service. Led engineering pods through Agile lifecycles, optimizing API performance and eliminating redundant database operations across PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Redis.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Progressed from intern to Team Lead while developing a large-scale warehouse management system (WMS). Transitioned the frontend architecture to full-stack Node.js and PHP, designed relational MySQL databases, and successfully coordinated the infrastructure migration from DigitalOcean to AWS Elastic Beanstalk.
